name: ruby-logging
title: ruby-logging
summary: flexible and extendable logging library for Ruby
description:
flexible and extendable logging library for Ruby
Logging is a flexible logging library for use in Ruby programs based on the
design of Java's log4j library. It features a hierarchical logging system,
custom level names, multiple output destinations per log event, custom
formatting, and more.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-logging because flexible and extendable logging library for Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-logging as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-logging with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-logging --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
